about.label: About us
about.title: Primexus Global D.O.O.
about.subtitle: A company headquartered in Ljig, dedicated to delivering premium BPO and CX services across Europe.
about.desc: Primexus Global provides customer and technical support services in foreign languages, call center services, administrative and business support, outsourcing services for domestic and international companies, telemarketing, market research, business consulting, data processing, IT support, employee training and other legally permitted activities.

jobs.title: Open positions
jobs.subtitle: Find your perfect job. We're growing and looking for talented people.

job1.title: Customer Support Agent — German
job1.desc: Provide customer support in German via chat, email and phone. Work from home with flexible hours.

job2.title: Customer Support Agent — English
job2.desc: Communicate with customers across Europe in English. Ideal for outgoing people who enjoy helping others.

job3.title: Team Leader — Call Center
job3.desc: Lead a team of agents, track KPI metrics, train new colleagues and ensure high service quality.

job4.title: IT Support Specialist
job4.desc: Provide technical support to customers, resolve software and hardware issues, maintain help desk systems.

job5.title: Telemarketing Agent — German market
job5.desc: Contact potential clients in the German market, present products and services of our partners.

job6.title: Data Processing Specialist
job6.desc: Entry, validation and analysis of business data for domestic and international clients. Attention to detail is key.

job7.title: QA Analyst — Quality Assurance
job7.desc: Listen to and evaluate agent calls, provide feedback and help maintain high service standards.

job8.title: Open application — send your CV
job8.desc: Didn't find a position that suits you? Send us your CV and we'll contact you when a matching role opens.
